channel.title: Alex Makes Games
channel.description: Recent content on Alex Makes Games

item.title: About
item.description: Hi there, I’m Alex. I’m a software engineer at Xbox Game Studios where I work on Forza Motorsport. In the past, I worked on the cannibalistic RTS Tooth & Tail, and the VR strategy game Skylight. I’m a San Diego native living in Washington and I hold a B.S. in Computer Science from the University of California, San Diego
